- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation only

- [ ] Maintenance/tooling
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked approved issue

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Updated docs when behavior changed
